name: MIRROR: Learning from the Other View for Multi-Modal Reasoning
summary: arXiv:2607.21552v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Unlike large language models (LLMs) that exhibit strong reasoning capabilities, vision-language models (VLMs) struggle with visual reasoning, even on...
description: arXiv:2607.21552v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Unlike large language models (LLMs) that exhibit strong reasoning capabilities, vision-language models (VLMs) struggle with visual reasoning, even on geometry problems that admit equivalent text, diagram, and combined diagram+text views. We show that these views often elicit different behaviors: a model may solve a problem from text but fail on th...
author: Wen Ye, Yuxiao Qu, Aviral Kumar, Xuezhe Ma
